scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n login,world,combat,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w login-server" "npm run dev -w world-server" "npm run dev -w combat-server" "npm run dev -w gateway"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n login,world,combat,gateway,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w login-server" "npm run dev -w world-server" "npm run dev -w combat-server" "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w web-client"
